name: Initialize project
description: Set up Vite + React + TypeScript, install dependencies (dnd-kit, lucide-react, etc.), create folder structure.

name: Define TypeScript types
description: Create types for Board, List, Card, User, Label with proper interfaces.

name: Build Board component
description: Display a board with lists rendered horizontally. Allow adding new lists via button.

name: Build List component
description: Each list displays cards, a header with list title, and a 'Add Card' button.

name: Build Card component
description: Show card title, assignee avatar, due date indicator, labels. Click opens modal for details.

name: Implement card modal
description: Full modal with title, description, due date picker, assignee selector, labels, comments.

name: Implement drag & drop
description: Use @dnd-kit/core to allow dragging cards between lists; optionally reorder lists.

name: Local storage persistence
description: Save board state to localStorage on every change; load on mount.

name: Search and filter
description: Add a search bar and filter chips for assignee/labels; filter cards dynamically.

name: Polish UI with glassmorphism
description: Apply glassmorphism effects (transparent backgrounds, backdrop-filter blur, border highlights) to lists, cards, modals.

name: Responsive design
description: Ensure board looks good on mobile (horizontal scroll for lists).

name: Dark mode toggle
description: Add a sun/moon icon to switch between light and dark glass styles.
